movesList.name: Combo Breaker
inputs: or HP+HK (Must match opponent's attack strength)

movesList.name: Counter Breaker
inputs: MP+MK (While attacking during your own combo)

movesList.name: Instinct Mode
inputs: HP+HK (Requires full Instinct Meter; stops time briefly and activates character-specific buffs)

movesList.name: Shadow Counter
inputs: PP or KK (While blocking, costs 1 bar of Shadow Meter)
